span.p: basket stable, total margin still declining

span.p: Dispensary margin below target or declining

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is gross margin per category declining, or is total store margin declining?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Which category is the driver?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Has basket size or UPT declined?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Review cost of goods for flower - turns and aging - consider mix shift toward higher-margin categories

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Review wholesale cost trends and menu pricing - concentrates often compress on price without commensurate COGS reduction

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Accessories carry high margin - a decline signals assortment or training gap - audit budtender add-on behavior

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Workforce and menu problem - run budtender product-knowledge audit and check menu assortment against high-margin SKUs

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Has 280E tax burden increased - higher net income, more disallowed cost?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Tax-structure problem - route to cannabis-finance-analyst for 280E COGS re-allocation review

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Cost-structure problem - review below-the-line operating costs and cash-handling fees for compression
